title: The regularity criterion for 3D Navier-Stokes Equations
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1005.4463 by other authors
summary:
In this article, we establish sufficient conditions for the regularity of
solutions of Navier-Stokes equations based on one of the nine entries of the
gradient tensor. We improve the recently results of C.S. Cao, E.S. Titi (Arch.
Rational Mech.Anal. 202 (2011) 919-932) and Y. Zhou, M. Pokorn$\acute{y}$
(Nonlinearity 23, 1097-1107 (2010)).
